meta.title: Pasin bilong bosim ol samting na pasin bilong putim ol tok i go long ol narapela

hero.title: Pasin bilong bosim ol samting na pasin bilong putim ol tok i go long ol narapela
hero.lead: IATF i save mekim ol projek bilong helpim ol man long kliagut long ol tok bilong Baibel, ol i ken ritim gut, na ol man i ken lukautim gut.
support: Dispela pes i stori long wanem ol samting i stret long kisim, olsem wanem ol i save holim ol buk, na wanem wok ol i mas mekim bihain long ol i kisim ol buk.

header.title: Wok bilong en i stret, em i bilong husat, na em i gat rait long mekim dispela wok

cards.title: Em i stret long mekim wok
paragraphs: IATF i save orait long ol wok em ol i mekim bilong stretim ol hevi i save pasim rot bilong ol man long kisim save long ol buk na nius, na ol i gat bikpela helpim long ol man.
Wanpela projek i mas mekim gut wok bilong em, na em i no ken stap olsem wanpela wokflow bilong em yet tasol, nogat, em i mas i stap olsem ples bilong ol man long kisim save long ol samting.

IATF i mekim wok long Web bilong helpim ol man long kliagut long ol samting ol i laik save long en. [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/) Na tu, ol samting ol man i mekim long ol dispela samting i kamapim klia ol samting i wok tru.

cards.title: Ol i tok orait long projek
paragraphs: Ol i ken orait long wanpela propesen sapos ol i skelim na i luk olsem:
items: em i helpim ol man long i go klostu long ol narapela
hevi i klia tumas na yu inap skelim
mak i stret long mekim wok
wok i stret wantaim wok bilong IATF
i gat rot bilong mekim wok bilong lukautim o pinisim

cards.title: Ol lain i gat wok long lukautim ol data
paragraphs: Ol projek em IATF i orait long en ol i kamap aninit long GitHub oganaisesen.
Ol dispela haus i stap long dispela hap, olsem na olgeta wan wan projek i stap olsem haus bilong ol man, maski bihain ol man bilong lukautim ol i senis.

cards.title: Pasin Bilong Givim Lisens
paragraphs: Ol projek bilong IATF i save yusim kopilef laisens, sapos wanpela projek i no tok narapela:
items: Kod: AGPL-3.0
Ol buk na nius: CC BY-SA 4.0

maintainer.title: Enjinia o man bilong lukautim ol samting
paragraphs: Olgeta projek ol i orait long en i mas i gat wanpela man o meri i gat wok bilong lukautim ol dispela projek.
items: helpim ol man long kisim save long ol samting
mekim wok long ol buk na nius bilong helpim ol man long kisim save long ol samting
skelim o stretim ol samting na kisim ol askim
raitim ol bikpela disisen bilong ol
helpim ol narapela long kliagut long wok
maintainer.footnote: Dispela em i wok bilong ol lain i stap insait long IATF. Ol i gat wok long lukautim na stretim ol samting long sait bilong wok, na ol i mas wok gut wantaim ol narapela lain, tasol ol i no ken mekim wok long ol samting ol yet i makim bilong mekim.

publicDevelopment.title: Wok bilong helpim ol man
paragraphs: Ol projek i kamap long rot bilong IATF i save kamap long ples klia.
items: Sous kod
ol samting
ol buk na nius
Ol tok i stap long roadmap
stori bilong ol samting i bin kamap
publicDevelopment.footnote: Ol bikpela save bilong projek i no ken stap tasol long ol chat o inbox.

header.kicker: Ol buk na nius bilong ol man
header.title: Ol rekot bilong ol askim bilong ol man

paragraphs: Ol askim i go insait long IATF long rot bilong websait, email, Discord, GitHub, o ol narapela rot bilong iATF i ken kamap ol rekod bilong ol askim i stap long ples klia.

IATF inap mekim sumatin, redaktim, o stretim gen wanpela askim paslain long ol i pablisaim, na bai ol i ken skelim ol samting ol i laik bai ol man i ken save long en, na ol i no ken kamapim ol samting bilong ol yet.
Ol rekot bilong ol askim bilong ol man i ken stap long IATF GitHub oganaisesen, long dispela websait, o long tupela wantaim.

Paslain long ol i kamapim ol dispela toksave, IATF i save rausim ol samting i no gat wok long en bilong ol man i ken toktok wantaim ol narapela, ol adres bilong ol yet, na ol samting bilong luksave long ol wan wan man i save yusim ol dispela teknoloji bilong helpim ol man long mekim wok, sapos i no klia olsem ol i laik kamapim na i stret long mekim olsem.
IATF i no save arkim ol toktok insait long Discord, na Discord i save lukautim ol dispela toktok. Ol disisen ol i mekim insait long Diskord i mas i stap long GitHub o long pes bilong projek.

Ol rekod bilong askim i no insait long wok bilong painim long rot bilong ol enjin bilong painim ol samting, long wanem, ol dispela samting i stret long mekim. Ol samting i stap long ples klia i makim olsem ol i ken skelim na skelim ol samting ol i bin mekim. Em i no makim olsem dispela ol samting i gutpela tru bilong ol man i ken painim taim ol i wok long painim nem bilong ol samting.

IATF inap stretim o rausim ol rekod long ol pablik sait em IAT F i save bosim, tasol em i no inap garantim olsem ol bai rausim long third-party caches, notifications, forks, screenshots, search engines, Discord, o ol narapela sistem.
Sapos yu laik bai ol tok bilong yu i mas i stap olsem samting bilong yu yet, orait yu no ken salim long rot bilong IATF.

chair.lead: Dispela i narapela kain long wok bilong ol lain i save lukautim ol projek: em i gat wok long lukautim oganaisesen olgeta, na em i no gat wok bilong stiaim ol samting i kamap long olgeta wan wan de.

duties.title: Wok bilong sia
items: Makim ol loa bilong papa long IATF GitHub oganaisesen
Sainim tok orait long projek na ol disisen long putim long arkip
Em i save mekim wok olsem pablik kontakti bilong IATF
Lukautim wok bilong makim ol man bilong mekim wok long olgeta yia
duties.footnote: Dispela siaman i no gat wok long IATF long salim ol samting long ol narapela, o baim ol wok bilong ol, o ol kontrak long sait bilong sevis, na em i no inap daunim ol disisen bilong ol man i lukautim olgeta wan wan repository long ol samting ol i mas mekim bilong stiaim wok.

election.title: Ol i save makim wanpela long olgeta yia
paragraphs: Ol i save makim em wanpela taim long olgeta yia, long ol namba wan tupela wik bilong Disemba, na ol i save tokaut long ol samting i kamap long Disemba 15, na nupela taim bilong em i kirap long Janueri 1.

Ol man i gat rait long vout em ol manmeri husat i bin holim wanpela wok bilong lukautim long wanpela IATF repository long dispela yia na ol i bin mekim wanpela wok insait long wanpela repoteri bilong Iatf long yia i go pinis. Wanwan voter i gat wanpela vout. Kandida i gat planti vout i win; sapos i gat wankain vout, bai i gat narapela vout long namba tri wik bilong Disemba.
Ol ileksen i kamap olsem wanpela pablik toktok long GitHub long IATF, olsem na ol kandidet, vout, na resulta i stap long pablik rekot.

continuity.title: Wok i Go Yet
paragraphs: Sapos i no gat wanpela ileksen i kamap long wanpela yia, presiden i mekim yet wok bilong em i go inap long narapela ileksen.

Na tu, ol man i gat wok long mekim wok bilong ol inap singautim ol man long mekim narapela kain ileksen, na ol i ken tokaut long risen bilong en, na dispela ileksen i mas bihainim wankain lo olsem ol ileksen ol i save mekim long olgeta yia.

current.title: Nau em i stap olsem siaman

fields.label: Sios
fields.value: ples bilong ol man i dai pinis

fields.label: Tok
fields.value: I go inap long Disemba 2026 ileksen

fields.label: Wok bilong em i kamap ples klia
Namba wan taim ol i makim

chair.footnote: Long yia 2026 ol i mekim wok olsem siaman bilong wanpela oganaisesen.

states.title: Ol samting i kamap long projek
paragraphs: Ol projek i mekim wok long liklik lain bilong gavman:
items: Tok Pisin
Ol i orait long en
Mekim wok
Ol i stap gut
Painim man bilong lukautim
Ol i putim long arkip
states.footnote: Ol dispela kantri i mekim na i no hatwok long kisim save long ol samting i stap long buk.

reassignment.title: Ol i putim gen long narapela hap na putim long arkip
paragraphs: Sapos wanpela man bilong lukautim wok i lusim wok o em i no mekim wok moa, IATF inap makim narapela man long mekim wok, pasim wok, o putim dispela wok long arkip.
Na tu, taim ol i pinisim wok bilong stretim wanpela projek, o ol i no inap mekim wok moa, ol i ken putim dispela wok long arkip.
reassignment.footnote: Ol projek ol i bin putim long arkip i stap long ai bilong ol man, sapos i no gat wanpela bikpela as na ol i no ken mekim olsem.

header.title: Ol samting IATF i no inap tok orait long en

items: salim ol samting i go long ol man bilong narapela kantri
ol kontrak bilong mekim wok
orait long olgeta tok
long-term maintenance bilong olgeta projek
boundaries.footnote: IATF em wanpela pablik repozitori, na i no wanpela sevis bilong salim ol samting i go long ol man.
